body:
This PR updates all UQ parameter parsing and writing functionality to work with the new `ParameterDistribution` API. 

- [x] read UQ parameters
- [x] write UQ parameters
- [x] update tests
- [x] add regularization flags
- [x] clean up and review
title: [WIP] Change UQ parameter parsing/writing to work with new `ParameterDistribution` API
